This will serve as the master template for building every module and will make execution seamless.

🚀 This document outlines every rule, protocol, assignment type, and organizational structure necessary to finalize the course framework. Once locked in, we will use this as the foundation for all Canvas modules, weekly lessons, student pathways, and grading protocols.
